queries.question: Provide a list of all the articles that won the Pulitzer Prize and also provide a list of articles that won the George Polk Awards in 2010.
queries.sql:
SELECT Articles.Title 
FROM Awards JOIN Winners ON Awards.AwardID = Winners.AwardID JOIN Articles ON Articles.ArticleID = Winners.WinningArticleID
WHERE Awards.AwardType = "Pulitzer Prize" OR Awards.AwardType = "George Polk Award" AND Winners.Year = 2010
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?awards a :Awards .
  ?winners a :Winners .
  ?winners p:hasAwards ?awards .
  ?articles a :Articles .
  ?winners p:hasArticles ?articles .
  ?articles p:Title ?title .
  ?awards p:AwardType ?awardtype_w .
  ?awards p:AwardType ?awardtype_w2 .
  ?winners p:Year ?year_w .
  FILTER((STR(?awardtype_w) = "Pulitzer Prize" || (STR(?awardtype_w2) = "George Polk Award" && (STR(?year_w) = "2010" || STR(?year_w) = "2010.0"))))
}

queries.question: Show articles that won Pulitzer Prize or George Polk Award in 2010.
queries.sql:
SELECT Articles.Title 
FROM Awards JOIN Winners ON Awards.AwardID = Winners.AwardID JOIN Articles ON Articles.ArticleID = Winners.WinningArticleID
WHERE (Awards.AwardType = "Pulitzer Prize" OR Awards.AwardType = "George Polk Award") AND Winners.Year = 2010
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?awards a :Awards .
  ?winners a :Winners .
  ?winners p:hasAwards ?awards .
  ?articles a :Articles .
  ?winners p:hasArticles ?articles .
  ?articles p:Title ?title .
  ?awards p:AwardType ?awardtype_w .
  ?awards p:AwardType ?awardtype_w2 .
  ?winners p:Year ?year_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?awardtype_w) = "Pulitzer Prize" || STR(?awardtype_w2) = "George Polk Award")) && (STR(?year_w) = "2010" || STR(?year_w) = "2010.0")))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show articles that won Pulitzer Prize or George Polk Award in 2010.
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE attachment {
  low: { SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?awards a :Awards .
  ?winners a :Winners .
  ?winners p:hasAwards ?awards .
  ?articles a :Articles .
  ?winners p:hasArticles ?articles .
  ?articles p:Title ?title .
  ?awards p:AwardType ?awardtype_w .
  ?awards p:AwardType ?awardtype_w2 .
  ?winners p:Year ?year_w .
  FILTER((STR(?awardtype_w) = "Pulitzer Prize" || (STR(?awardtype_w2) = "George Polk Award" && (STR(?year_w) = "2010" || STR(?year_w) = "2010.0"))))
} }
  high: { SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?awards a :Awards .
  ?winners a :Winners .
  ?winners p:hasAwards ?awards .
  ?articles a :Articles .
  ?winners p:hasArticles ?articles .
  ?articles p:Title ?title .
  ?awards p:AwardType ?awardtype_w .
  ?awards p:AwardType ?awardtype_w2 .
  ?winners p:Year ?year_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?awardtype_w) = "Pulitzer Prize" || STR(?awardtype_w2) = "George Polk Award")) && (STR(?year_w) = "2010" || STR(?year_w) = "2010.0")))
} }
}
